propositions: Duplicated command/tool/config catalogs in README.md are covered by generated CLI and MCP references and should be trimmed.
The duplicated catalogs should be replaced with short pointers linking to docs/cli-reference.md and docs/mcp-reference.md.
README.md must shrink to at most 500 lines to prove the catalog was genuinely removed rather than re-linked.
Front-door narrative sections (why/how it works, install, quickstart) must be preserved in README.md.
README.md must contain no dead relative links.
This work is sequenced after the CLI/MCP reference generators land so the README points at real generated pages.
